title: SAGIDE Workflow Definition
description: Schema for workflow YAML files loaded by WorkflowDefinitionLoader.

parameters.description: Input parameters the user fills in at launch time. Accessible in step prompts via {{param_name}}.

steps.description: Ordered list of workflow steps. Execution order is determined by depends_on, not list position.

convergence_policy.description: Required when the workflow contains feedback loops (next: back-edges). Defines max iterations and escalation.

name.description: Parameter name. Accessible in prompts as {{name}}.

type.description: Data type for documentation purposes. All values are passed as strings at runtime.

default.description: Default value used when the user does not supply one.

id.description: Unique step identifier within this workflow. Used in depends_on, next, and output references ({{step_id.output}}).

type.description: Step type. 'agent' submits an AI task; 'router' branches conditionally; 'tool' runs a shell command; 'constraint' evaluates an expression; 'context_retrieval' aggregates step outputs; 'human_approval' pauses for user decision.

depends_on.description: Step IDs that must complete successfully before this step can run. Parallel execution is automatic when multiple steps share the same depends_on.

agent.description: Agent type for 'agent' steps (case-insensitive). One of: Coder/CodeGenerator/Generator, Reviewer/CodeReviewer, Tester/UnitTester, Security/SecurityReviewer, Documenter/Documentation, Debug/Debugger.

prompt.description: Scriban prompt template for 'agent' steps. Supports {{param_name}} and {{step_id.output}} substitution.

model_id.description: Override model ID for this step (e.g. 'claude-sonnet-4-6'). Overrides the default model selected at launch.

next.description: Step ID to loop back to after this step completes (feedback loop). Requires convergence_policy at the workflow level.

max_iterations.description: Maximum loop iterations when 'next' is set. 1 = no looping.

branches.description: Conditional branches for 'router' steps. Evaluated in order; first match wins.

command.description: Shell command for 'tool' steps (e.g. 'dotnet build', 'npm test').

working_dir.description: Working directory for the command. Defaults to the workflow workspace path.

exit_code_policy.description: How non-zero exit codes are handled.

timeout_sec.description: Per-step wall-clock timeout in seconds for 'tool' steps. 0 = no timeout.

on_constraint_fail.description: Action when the constraint expression is false.

context_var_name.description: Variable name set by 'context_retrieval' steps. Available in downstream prompts as {{context_var_name}}.

source_steps.description: Step IDs whose outputs are concatenated into context_var_name (for 'context_retrieval' steps).

sla_hours.description: Hours before the approval SLA is breached (for 'human_approval' steps). 0 = no timeout.

timeout_action.description: Action on SLA breach: cancel the workflow or send it to the dead-letter queue.

approval_prompt.description: Human-readable prompt shown in the approval UI. Supports {{step_id.output}} template variables.

shadow_branch.description: Git ref to snapshot when provisioning a shadow worktree (for 'workspace_setup' steps).

shadow_action.description: Action on 'workspace_teardown': promote applies the shadow diff to the real workspace; destroy discards it.

condition.description: Condition expression evaluated against the preceding step's result. Built-in: 'hasIssues', 'success', 'failed'. String match: 'output.contains("text")'.

target.description: Step ID to activate when this condition is true.

ConvergencePolicy.description: Governs feedback loops. Required when any step has a 'next' back-edge.

escalation_target.description: Action when max_iterations is exceeded. HUMAN_APPROVAL pauses the workflow and pushes a notification.

partial_retry_scope.description: Which steps to retry on each iteration.

convergence_hint_memory.description: When true, hints from prior iterations are injected into refactor prompts to aid convergence.

timeout_per_iteration_sec.description: Wall-clock timeout per iteration in seconds. 0 = unlimited.

contradiction_detection.description: Immediately escalate to HUMAN_APPROVAL if issues fail to decrease between iterations, indicating mutually exclusive constraints.
